mapper.select:
SELECT -- 질문(헤더) 컬럼 q.qna_oid, q.user_id, q.wrt_nm, q.pswd, q.qna_ttl, q.qna_cn, q.ctgry, cd.cd_nm AS ctgry_nm, q.ans_yn, q.prvt_pst_yn, q.use_yn, q.inq_cnt, q.reg_dt, q.mdfcn_dt,
-- 답변(아이템) 컬럼 a.qna_oid AS item_qna_oid, a.up_qna_oid, a.user_id AS item_user_id, a.qna_ttl AS item_title, a.wrt_nm AS item_writer_nm, a.qna_cn AS item_content, a.reg_dt AS item_reg_dt, a.mdfcn_dt AS item_upd_dt FROM ${schema}.qna q LEFT JOIN ${schema}.qna a ON q.qna_oid = a.up_qna_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.grp_cd gc ON gc.grp_cd = 'CATEGORY_TYPE' AND gc.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN ${schema}.cd cd ON cd.grp_cd_oid = gc.grp_cd_oid AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND cd.cd_val = q.ctgry WHERE q.qna_oid = #{qnaOid}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${schema}.qna
user_id = #{userId},
wrt_nm = #{wrtNm},
qna_ttl = #{qnaTtl},
qna_cn = #{qnaCn},
ctgry = #{ctgry},
ans_yn = #{ansYn},
mdfcn_dt = NOW()
WHERE qna_oid = #{qnaOid} AND up_qna_oid = #{upQnaOid}
UPDATE ${schema}.qna SET use_yn = 'Y' , ans_yn = 'Y' , mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE qna_oid = #{qnaOid}
